title: Lead intake and dedupe
goal: Create or update a lead without creating duplicates, then tag it and create a follow-up task.

steps.description: Search for an existing contact by email before writing anything.
Create the contact only when the search returns no reliable match.
If a match exists, add intake/source tags instead of creating a duplicate.

input.title: Follow up with new lead
input.body: Lead source: {{source}}. Confirm need, budget, and timeline.

confirmationPoints: Before creating a new contact if the search returns possible duplicates
output: Return the contact ID, whether it was created or matched, tags applied, and task ID.
